100001001.NodeInformation: Boyce was investigating the whereabouts of the Dreamweaver in the village, but was unexpectedly recalled by the Creed.

100001002.Remark: 前往拉尔帕尔村，调查卢卡

100001005.Remark: 返回抓捕织梦师的现场调查

100001008.NodeName: The Other Side of the Dreamweaver

100001014.NodeInformation: Seeking the truth, Boyce resolutely drank the Synchrodream Potion, deemed forbidden by the Creed. At the end of the golden wheat field, the lost adult met that boy with bright eyes, holding his lance high.

100001019.NodeInformation: By the Fallen River, the truth has become as clear as an aurora in the night sky. Faced with the thunder of authority and the lives of the innocent, the loyal Creed Guard stands at the crossroads of destiny.

100001023.NodeInformation: Facing the questioning of the High Priest, he lowered his eyes. His gaze flickered as he ignored his inner voice once again. After a brief hesitation, he put on that cold mask again.

100001024.NodeInformation: The fog of truth has not completely dissipated, but Boyce is already prepared, gathering strength to shatter his shackles. In the bitter cold wind, he finally learned to listen to his inner voice.

100101001.NodeInformation: Two familiar little girls are crouching at Fafala's doorstep.

100101004.NodeName: Brew Special Soothing Honeydew for Fafala

100101007.NodeInformation: Try to jog Fafala's memory using the clues found in her home.

100101009.NodeInformation: Her world seems to be swallowed by fog once again.

100101010.NodeInformation: Since then, Fafala has refused to even look at me.

100101011.NodeName: Illusory Plague Hidden by the River
100101011.NodeInformation: The Illusory Plague manifested at a dead end, sealing the girl's heart.

126589770.NodeInformation: From here on, our journey is far more vast than we imagined.

100101013.NodeInformation: I hope I will grow tall like a tree, with you always by my side.
